reviews.review_msg: Great person, great professor, great experience. Honestly, he's a big reason I'm still in this degree. Always encouraged us to take the extra credit, and this was easily one of the hardest things I've done. Give him a textbook and he'll rule the world.
The reason I passed 477. Thanks professor DongSheng!

Professor DongSheng definitely makes you work for it. His work outside of class is truly inspirational and he really shows the extent of the human spirit. His extracurriculars are difficult and taxing on the body but the extra credit is always more than worth it.
10/10 Prof, would drink with him again

Great prof, clear lectures, and insanely consistent. Eats like it's a professional sport and treats gambling probability with unwavering confidence. Solid lectures, unforgettable presence. 10/10 would take again!
